name: Microsoft Excel
description: Spreadsheet application, part of Microsoft 365 / Office for Mac suite

extraction.note: Scrape the first table row (latest version). Excel and Word share the same version number.

download.note: Suite fwlink redirects to latest full PKG. Individual updater PKGs are smaller — check if app is already installed.

changelog.note: Page contains full version history table with dates and build numbers. SHA-256 hashes published for each update.

release_date.note: First column of the version history table is release date

notes: Version shared across all Office for Mac apps (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook, OneNote). Microsoft AutoUpdate (MAU) handles in-app updates. The GUID in the CDN URL path is shared across all Office for Mac apps. Office 2021 (non-subscription) uses different fwlink: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=820886.
